subject: Add csar type flag to csar-validation command line
commit_message:
Add csar type flag to csar-validation command line

Change-Id: I56a08c30486101d01c2177b6d9d0fcbd2ee68c84
Issue-ID: VNFSDK-379
Signed-off-by: Zebek Bogumil <bogumil.zebek@nokia.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vnfsdk-pkgtools-master-pkgtools-verify-python/65/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vnfsdk-pkgtools-master-pkgtools-verify-python/65

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi,

I would like you to consider this wiki defined for the R4  https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=51282875 and can you please incorporate it in csarvalidation project, which is used to do the validation of csar package compliant to ONAP. so this would help to support PNF similar to VNF.

Thanks

Patch Set 1:

I don't understand why I got -1 :(

This is the first step to support PNF csar according to specification: https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=51282875

My steps to fulfill above specification are:
1. Extend CLI to support csar_type flag
2. Support TOSCA.meta file - code refactor + maybe some logic to handle all required tags
3. Support manifest file according to specification + code refactor

Patch Set 1:

Dear Bogumil, pls find the reason for -1: here. 
during the last release, we have discussed this issue that for validation, we are having code in different repo within vnfsdk, which is not good practise and it was decided to keep all the required csar validation under validation/csarvalidation project. 

In this release, we have already enabled the CSAR package validation considering the SOL004 and ONAP VNFREQS, in csarvalidation project. so could you please add all PNF changes in the same project, so that our unified effort produce the right artifact to support CSAR validation. 

Thanks.

Also pls consider the link for supporting the PNF validation https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=51282875 

And let me know if any you have any concerns or questions.
